app.title: TraceNex Partner
app.tagline: Compliant channel distribution platform · Powered by TraceNex
home.hero.title: Compliant, auditable AI channel distribution
home.hero.subtitle: Whitelisted models, monthly invoicing and end-to-end audit trails — grow your distribution business inside a compliance-first framework.
home.feature.compliance.title: Full-stack compliance
home.feature.compliance.body: ICP filing, generative AI filing, algorithm filing, deep-synthesis filing, PIPL separate consent.
home.feature.audit.title: Auditable
home.feature.audit.body: Hash-chained audit log with 200ms segment sealing — meets MLPS 2.0 Level 2.
home.feature.settle.title: Monthly settlement
home.feature.settle.body: Auto-issued e-invoices; red-flush handled by the audit console.
home.feature.kyc.title: KYC + liveness
home.feature.kyc.body: ID card, business license and legal-rep liveness — direct OSS upload with magic-byte verification.
models.title: Model marketplace
models.subtitle: Models that have passed TraceNex compliance review · prices per 1k tokens
models.col.name: Model
models.beta_banner: ICP business license pending — channel preview only; pricing subject to final contract.
pricing.title: Pricing & billing rules
pricing.subtitle: Transparent · per-token · monthly settlement supported
pricing.rule.token.title: Per-token billing
pricing.rule.token.body: Input / output prices are public on the marketplace; charges apply per usage on call completion.
pricing.rule.markup.title: Channel markup
pricing.rule.markup.body: Partners may configure non-overlapping markup ranges per model in the back office.
pricing.rule.invoice.title: Settlement & invoice
pricing.rule.invoice.body: Monthly closing auto-issues an e-invoice. Open a ticket for red-flush corrections.
pricing.beta_notice: Until the licensed settlement provider is live, balances are held / released against the channel wallet.
apply.title: Apply to be a TraceNex partner
apply.subtitle: Our team will reach out within 3 business days after you submit
apply.kyc.size_limit: Up to {{mb}} MB · jpg / png / pdf
apply.consent.title: PIPL separate consent
apply.consent.body: To complete partner KYC we collect contact and legal representative names, phone, email, ID number, business license and liveness video. Used only for KYC, contracting and regulatory reporting; retained for 5 years.
apply.consent.checkbox: I have read and separately consent to the processing of the above sensitive personal information
apply.consent.required: Separate consent is required before submitting
apply.success.title: Submitted — pending review
apply.success.body: We received your application (#{{id}}). Our team will contact you by email within 3 business days.
errors.network: Network error, please check and retry
errors.auth.jwt_revoked: Session expired, please log in again
notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.body: The page you requested is unavailable or the link is incorrect.
